***  
the error occurs because the wpf assembly is not properly referenced in the mac environment. the main application is built for .net 7, but when running on mac, it uses cocoa to open the window, which does not include the necessary assemblies. to solve this, the wpf assembly should be included in the mac project's dependencies. the network between the two platforms must be ensured so that the correct assemblies are available. the money involved in this setup includes the cost of maintaining two different build processes. the travel between the platforms requires careful testing and configuration.
